title: Stratum
description: Stratum: A stratum containing the geological information based on the AGS schema.

Id.description: Location identifier relating the borehole to the strata (LOCA_ID).

Top.description: Depth to the top of the strata based on the datum provided on the Borehole (GEOL_TOP). Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Bottom.description: Depth to the bottom of the strata based on the datum provided on the Borehole (GEOL_BOT). Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Legend.description: The legend code summarising the LogDescription (GEOL_LEG).

ObservedGeology.description: The observed geology expressed as a GeologicalUnit (GEOL_GEOL).

InterpretedGeology.description: The interpreted geology expressed as an engineering material (GEOL_GEO2).

OptionalInterpretedGeology.description: The optional interpreted geology expressed as an engineering material (GEOL_GEO3).

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
